We need a palletizing cell on the new packaging floor. The space is roughly 7 by 5 meters. The customer wants something around 10 boxes a minute, give or take. They haven't decided on pallet type yet — could be EUR or GMA depending on the export region. Box size and weight aren't finalized either; the marketing team is still arguing about packaging design. Just block out a feasible cell layout for budgeting purposes.
